name: Mock Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix buttermilk, salt, pepper, and nutmeg in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Add chicken pieces one at a time, turning to coat evenly with the buttermilk mixture.
4. Place bread crumbs in a shallow bowl.
5. Turn each coated chicken piece into the bread crumbs, ensuring it is evenly covered.
6. Arrange the chicken on a foil-lined baking sheet.
7. Bake until the coating is crisp and the juice runs clear when a thigh is pierced with a fork (about 50 minutes).
8. Serve hot or at room temperature.
